principle: sdkwork-payment MUST NOT depend on sdkwork-order crates or packages
allowedDependencyDirection: order -> payment (in-process ports and HTTP SDK consumers)
payment -> commerce_order table (read-only FK validation SQL in payment-repository-sqlx)

forbiddenDependencies.reason: Payment executor owns pay/refund/webhook-ingest ports; order orchestrates settlement
Order store types must not leak into payment repository

canonicalSharedTypes.orderReExport: sdkwork-order-service re-exports payment types for order routers only

verification: rg 'sdkwork_order' crates/ Cargo.toml must return no matches in sdkwork-payment workspace
